verses.geez:
ወአስተርአዮ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለአብርሃም ፡ በኀበ ፡ ዕፀ ፡ ምንባሬ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይነብር ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኆኅተ ፡ ሐይመት ፡
                  ቀትረ ።

translations.lxx: And God appeared to him by the oak of Mambre, as he sat by the door of his tent at noon.
translations.kjv: And the LORD appeared unto him in the plains of Mamre: and he sat in the tent door in the heat of the day;

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ አልዐለ ፡ አዕይንቲሁ ፡ ወነጸረ ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ሠለስቱ ፡ ዕደው ፡ ይቀውሙ ፡ መልዕልቴሁ ፡ [ወርእየ ፡ ወሮጸ ፡
                  ለተቀብሎቶም ፡ እምኆኅተ ፡ ሐይመት ፡] ወሰገደ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: And he lifted up his eyes and beheld, and lo! three men stood before him; and having seen them he ran to meet them from the door of his tent, and did obeisance to the ground.
translations.kjv: And he lift up his eyes and looked, and, lo, three men stood by him: and when he saw them, he ran to meet them from the tent door, and bowed himself toward the ground,

verses.geez: ወይቤሎሙ ፡ አጋእስትየ ፡ እመ ፡ ረከብኩ ፡ ሞገሰ ፡ በቅድመ ፡ አዕይንቲክሙ ፤

translations.lxx: And he said, Lord, if indeed I have found grace in thy sight, pass not by thy servant.
translations.kjv: And said, My LORD, if now I have found favour in thy sight, pass not away, I pray thee, from thy servant:

verses.geez: ናምጽእ ፡ ማየ ፡ ወንኅፅብ ፡ እገሪክሙ ፡ ወታጽልሉ ፡ ታሕተ ፡ ዕፅ ።

translations.lxx: Let water now be brought, and let them wash your feet, and do ye refresh yourselves under the tree.
translations.kjv: Let a little water, I pray you, be fetched, and wash your feet, and rest yourselves under the tree:

verses.geez:
ወናምጽእ ፡ ኅብስተ ፡ ወትብልዑ ፡ ወእምዝ ፡ ትሑሩ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ሐለይክሙ ፡ እምከመ ፡ ግሕሥክሙ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ገብርክሙ ፡
                  ወይቤልዎ ፡ ግበር ፡ ከማሁ ፡ በከመ ፡ ትቤ ።

translations.lxx: And I will bring bread, and ye shall eat, and after this ye shall depart on your journey, on account of which refreshment ye have turned aside to your servant. And he said, So do, as thou hast said.
translations.kjv: And I will fetch a morsel of bread, and comfort ye your hearts; after that ye shall pass on: for therefore are ye come to your servant. And they said, So do, as thou hast said.

verses.geez:
ወሮጸ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ኀበ ፡ ሳራ ፡ ብእሲቱ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሐይመታ ፡ ወይቤላ ፡ አፍጥኒ ፡ ወአብሕኢ ፡ ሠለስተ ፡ መሣልሰ ፡
                  ስንዳሌ ፡ ወግበሪ ፡ ደፍንተ ።

translations.lxx: And Abraam hasted to the tent to Sarrha, and said to her, Hasten, and knead three measures of fine flour, and make cakes.
translations.kjv: And Abraham hastened into the tent unto Sarah, and said, Make ready quickly three measures of fine meal, knead it, and make cakes upon the hearth.

verses.geez:
ወሮጸ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ኀበ ፡ አልህምት ፡ ወነሥአ ፡ አሐደ ፡ ላህመ ፡ ንኡሰ ፡ ወሠናየ ፡ ወወሀቦ ፡ ለቍልዔሁ ፡ ወአፍጠነ
                  ፡ ገቢሮቶ ።

translations.lxx: And Abraam ran to the kine, and took a young calf, tender and good, and gave it to his servant, and he hasted to dress it.
translations.kjv: And Abraham ran unto the herd, and fetcht a calf tender and good, and gave it unto a young man; and he hasted to dress it.

verses.geez:
ወአምጽአ ፡ ዕቋነ ፡ (ወመዓረ ፡) ወውእተ ፡ ላህመ ፡ ዘገብረ ፡ ወአቅረበ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ወበልዑ ፡ ወውእቱሰ ፡ ይቀውም ፡
                  ኀበ ፡ ዕፅ ፡ ወይሜጥዎሙ ።

translations.lxx: And he took butter and milk, and the calf which he had dressed; and he set them before them, and they did eat, and he stood by them under the tree.
translations.kjv: And he took butter, and milk, and the calf which he had dressed, and set it before them; and he stood by them under the tree, and they did eat.

verses.geez: ወይቤልዎ ፡ አይቴ ፡ ሳራ ፡ ብእሲትከ ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ነያ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሐይመት ።

translations.lxx: And he said to him, Where is Sarrha thy wife? And he answered and said, Behold! in the tent.
translations.kjv: And they said unto him, Where is Sarah thy wife? And he said, Behold, in the tent.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ሶበ ፡ ገበእኩ ፡ እመጽእ ፡ ኀቤከ ፡ ዓመ ፡ ከመ ፡ ዮም ፡ ትረክብ ፡ ሳራ ፡ ውሉደ ፡ ወሰምዐት ፡ ሳራ ፡
                  እንዘ ፡ ትቀውም ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኆኅት ፡ እንዘ ፡ ሀለወት ፡ ድኅሬሁ ።

translations.lxx: And he said, I will return and come to thee according to this period seasonably, and Sarrha thy wife shall have a son; and Sarrha heard at the door of the tent, being behind him.
translations.kjv: And he said, I will certainly return unto thee according to the time of life; and, lo, Sarah thy wife shall have a son. And Sarah heard it in the tent door, which was behind him.

verses.geez: ወአብርሃምሰ ፡ ወሳራ ፡ ልህቁ ፡ ጥቀ ፡ ወኀለፈ ፡ መዋዕሊሆሙ ፡ ወኀደጋ ፡ ለሳራሂ ፡ ትክቶ ፡ አንስት ።

translations.lxx: And Abraam and Sarrha were old, advanced in days, and the custom of women ceased with Sarrha.
translations.kjv: Now Abraham and Sarah were old and well stricken in age; and it ceased to be with Sarah after the manner of women.

verses.geez: ወሠሐቀት ፡ ሳራ ፡ በባሕቲታ ፡ እስመ ፡ ትቤ ፡ በልባ ፡ ዓዲየኑ ፡ እስከ ፡ ይእዜ ፡ ወእግዚእየኒ ፡ ልህቀ ።

translations.lxx: And Sarrha laughed in herself, saying, The thing has not as yet happened to me, even until now, and my lord is old.
translations.kjv: Therefore Sarah laughed within herself, saying, After I am waxed old shall I have pleasure, my lord being old also?

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለአብርሃም ፡ ምንት ፡ አሥሐቃ ፡ ለሳራ ፡ በባሕቲታ ፡ እስመ ፡ ትቤ ፡ (ዓዲየኑ ፡ እስከ ፡
                  ይእዜ ፡ ወእግዚእየኒ ፡ ልህቀ ፡ ወ)አማንኑ ፡ እወልድ ፡ ወናሁ ፡ ረሣእኩ ፡ አንሰ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Abraam, Why is it that Sarrha has laughed in herself, saying, Shall I then indeed bear? but I am grown old.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto Abraham, Wherefore did Sarah laugh, saying, Shall I of a surety bear a child, which am old?

verses.geez: ቦኑ ፡ ነገር ፡ ዘይሰአኖ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ በዝንቱ ፡ ጊዜ ፡ ሶበ ፡ ገባእኩ ፡ ኀቤከ ፡ ትረክብ ፡ ሳራ ፡ ውሉደ ።

translations.lxx: Shall anything be impossible with the Lord? At this time I will return to thee seasonably, and Sarrha shall have a son.
translations.kjv: Is any thing too hard for the LORD? At the time appointed I will return unto thee, according to the time of life, and Sarah shall have a son.

verses.geez: ወክህደት ፡ ሳራ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ትብል ፡ ኢሠሐቁ ፡ እስመ ፡ ፈርሀት ፡ ወይቤላ ፡ አልቦ ፤ ሠሐቂ ።

translations.lxx: But Sarrha denied, saying, I did not laugh, for she was afraid. And he said to her, Nay, but thou didst laugh.
translations.kjv: Then Sarah denied, saying, I laughed not; for she was afraid. And he said, Nay; but thou didst laugh.

verses.geez:
ወተንሥኡ ፡ እልክቱ ፡ (ክልኤቱ ፡) ዕደው ፡ እምህየ ፡ ወአንጸሩ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ሶዶም ፡ ወጎሞራ ፡ ወሖረ ፡ አብርሃም ፡
                  ምስሌሆሙ ፡ ይፈንዎሙ ።

translations.lxx: And the men having risen up from thence looked towards Sodom and Gomorrha. And Abraam went with them, attending them on their journey.
translations.kjv: And the men rose up from thence, and looked toward Sodom: and Abraham went with them to bring them on the way.

verses.geez: ወይቤ ፡ እግዚእ ፡ ኢየኀብእ ፡ እምነ ፡ ቍልዔየ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ዘእገብር ፡ አነ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said, Shall I hide from Abraam my servant what things I intend to do?
translations.kjv: And the LORD said, Shall I hide from Abraham that thing which I do;

verses.geez: እስመ ፡ ሕዝበ ፡ ዐቢየ ፡ ይከውን ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ወብዙኀ ፡ ወይትባረኩ ፡ በእንቲአሁ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ አሕዛበ ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: But Abraam shall become a great and populous nation, and in him shall all the nations of the earth be blest.
translations.kjv: Seeing that Abraham shall surely become a great and mighty nation, and all the nations of the earth shall be blessed in him?

verses.geez:
እስመ ፡ ኣአምር ፡ ከመ ፡ ሀለዎ ፡ ለአብርሃም ፡ የአዝዞሙ ፡ ለደቂቁ ፡ ወለቤቱ ፡ ወያዕቅቦሙ ፡ ፍናዊሁ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር
                  ፡ ወይግበሩ ፡ ምጽዋተ ፡ ወፍትሐ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይግበር ፡ (ሎሙ ፡) እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለአብርሃም ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘይቤሎ ።

translations.lxx: For I know that he will order his sons, and his house after him, and they will keep the ways of the Lord, to do justice and judgment, that the Lord may bring upon Abraam all things whatsoever he has spoken to him.
translations.kjv: For I know him, that he will command his children and his household after him, and they shall keep the way of the LORD, to do justice and judgment; that the LORD may bring upon Abraham that which he hath spoken of him.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ጽራሖሙ ፡ ለሶዶም ፡ ወለጎሞራ ፡ በዝኀ ፡ ወኀጣውኢሆሙኒ ፡ ዐብየት ፡ ጥቀ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said, The cry of Sodom and Gomorrha has been increased towards me, and their sins are very great.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said, Because the cry of Sodom and Gomorrah is great, and because their sin is very grievous;

verses.geez:
ወእረድ ፡ እንከሰ ፡ ወእርአይ ፡ ለእመ ፡ በከመ ፡ ጽራኆሙ ፡ እንተ ፡ ትመጽእ ፡ ኀቤየ ፡ ይፌጽምዋ ፡ ወእመ ፡ አኮሰ ፡
                  ኣአምር ።

translations.lxx: I will therefore go down and see, if they completely correspond with the cry which comes to me, and if not, that I may know.
translations.kjv: I will go down now, and see whether they have done altogether according to the cry of it, which is come unto me; and if not, I will know.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ተመይጡ ፡ እምህየ ፡ እልክቱ ፡ ዕደው ፡ መጽኡ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሶዶም ፡ (ወጎሞር ፡) ወአብርሃምሰ ፡ ሀሎ ፡ ዓዲ ፡
                  ይቀውም ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And the men having departed thence, came to Sodom; and Abraam was still standing before the Lord.
translations.kjv: And the men turned their faces from thence, and went toward Sodom: but Abraham stood yet before the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወቀርበ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ወይቤ ፡ ኢታማስን ፡ እግዚኦ ፡ ጻድቃነ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ኃጥኣን ፡ ወኢይኩን ፡ ጸድቅ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኃጥእ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And Abraam drew nigh and said, Wouldest thou destroy the righteous with the wicked, and shall the righteous be as the wicked?
translations.kjv: And Abraham drew near, and said, Wilt thou also destroy the righteous with the wicked?

verses.geez:
ለእመ ፡ ሀለዉ ፡ ኀምሳ ፡ ጻድቃን ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ታማስኖሙኑ ፡ ወኢታሐዩኑ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ፶ጻድቃን ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ብሔረ
                  ።

translations.lxx: Should there be fifty righteous in the city, wilt thou destroy them? wilt thou not spare the whole place for the sake of the fifty righteous, if they be in it?
translations.kjv: Peradventure there be fifty righteous within the city: wilt thou also destroy and not spare the place for the fifty righteous that are therein?

verses.geez:
ሐሰ ፡ እግዚኦ ፡ ኢትግበር ፡ ዘንተ ፡ ነገረ ፡ ወኢትቅትል ፡ ጻድቃነ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ኃጥኣን ፡ ሐሰ ፡ ዘይኴንና ፡ ለኵለ ፡
                  ምድር ፡ ኢትግበር ፡ ዘንተ ፡ ደይነ ።

translations.lxx: By no means shalt thou do as this thing is so as to destroy the righteous with the wicked, so the righteous shall be as the wicked: by no means. Thou that judgest the whole earth, shalt thou not do right?
translations.kjv: That be far from thee to do after this manner, to slay the righteous with the wicked: and that the righteous should be as the wicked, that be far from thee: Shall not the Judge of all the earth do right?

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለአብርሃም ፡ ለእመ ፡ ረከብኩ ፡ በውስተ ፡ ሶዶም ፡ ሀገር ፡ ፶ጻድቃነ ፡ ኣድኅን ፡ ኵሎ ፡
                  ሀገረ ፡ በእንቲአሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said, If there should be in Sodom fifty righteous in the city, I will spare the whole city, and the whole place for their sakes.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said, If I find in Sodom fifty righteous within the city, then I will spare all the place for their sakes.

verses.geez:
ወአውሥአ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ወይቤ ፡ ይእዜ ፡ አኀዝኩ ፡ እትናገር ፡ ምስለ ፡ እግዚእየ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወአንሰ ፡ መሬት ፡
                  ወሐመድ ፡ አነ ።

translations.lxx: And Abraam answered and said, Now I have begun to speak to my Lord, and I am earth and ashes.
translations.kjv: And Abraham answered and said, Behold now, I have taken upon me to speak unto the LORD, which am but dust and ashes:

verses.geez:
ወእመኬ ፡ ውሕዱ ፡ እልክቱ ፡ ጻድቃን ፡ ኀምስተ ፡ ታማስኑ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ሀገረ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀምስቱ ፡ እለ ፡ ውሕዱ ፡
                  ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዘእ ፡ እመ ፡ ረከብኩ ፡ በህየ ፡ ፵፭ኢያማስን ፡ በእንቲአሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: But if the fifty righteous should be diminished to forty-five, wilt thou destroy the whole city because of the five wanting? And he said, I will not destroy it, if I should find there forty-five.
translations.kjv: Peradventure there shall lack five of the fifty righteous: wilt thou destroy all the city for lack of five? And he said, If I find there forty and five, I will not destroy it.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ለእመኬ ፡ ተረክቡ ፡ በህየ ፡ ፵ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ኢያማስን ፡ በእንተ ፡ ፵ ።

translations.lxx: And he continued to speak to him still, and said, But if there should be found there forty? And he said, I will not destroy it for the forty's sake.
translations.kjv: And he spake unto him yet again, and said, Peradventure there shall be forty found there. And he said, I will not do it for forty’s sake.

verses.geez:
ወደገመ ፡ ዓዲ ፡ ብሂሎቶ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ ወእመኬ ፡ ተረክቡ ፡ በህየ ፡ ፴ወይቤሎ ፡ ኢያማስን ፡ በእንተ ፡ ፴
                  ።

translations.lxx: And he said, Will there be anything against me, Lord, if I shall speak? but if there be found there thirty? And he said, I will not destroy it for the thirty's sake.
translations.kjv: And he said unto him, Oh let not the LORD be angry, and I will speak: Peradventure there shall thirty be found there. And he said, I will not do it, if I find thirty there.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ እስመ ፡ ተበዋሕኩ ፡ እትናገር ፡ ምስለ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወለእመኬ ፡ ተረክቡ ፡ በህየ ፡ ፳ወይቤሎ
                  ፡ ኢያማስን ፡ በእንተ ፡ ፳ ።

translations.lxx: And he said, Since I am able to speak to the Lord, what if there should be found there twenty? And he said, I will not destroy it, if I should find there twenty.
translations.kjv: And he said, Behold now, I have taken upon me to speak unto the LORD: Peradventure there shall be twenty found there. And he said, I will not destroy it for twenty’s sake.

verses.geez:
ወይቤ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ አብሐኒ ፡ እንብብ ፡ ዓዲ ፡ እግዚኦ ፡ ለእመኬ ፡ ተረክቡ ፡ በህየ ፡ ፲ወይቤሎ ፡ ኢያማስን ፡
                  በእንተ ፡ ፲ ።

translations.lxx: And he said, Will there be anything against me, Lord, if I speak yet once? but if there should be found there ten? And he said, I will not destroy it for the ten's sake.
translations.kjv: And he said, Oh let not the LORD be angry, and I will speak yet but this once: Peradventure ten shall be found there. And he said, I will not destroy it for ten’s sake.

verses.geez: ወሶበ ፡ አኅለቀ ፡ ተናግሮቶ ፡ ለአብርሃም ፡ ኀለፈ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወአብርሃምኒ ፡ ገብአ ፡ ምንባሪሁ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord departed, when he left off speaking to Abraam, and Abraam returned to his place.
translations.kjv: And the LORD went his way, as soon as he had left communing with Abraham: and Abraham returned unto his place.
